distractors.off_target_set: Situations where metrics and reality align; problems with no observability gap; questions about the framework rather than its application
distractors.description: Items where there is no map-territory gap to detect, or where the skill is applied to the framework itself

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND false_divergence_rate <= 0.15
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
